spec.name: A Golden Crypt
spec.description: You stand inside a small crypt with walls and ceiling made of golden bricks that obscure the large sandy stones of the pyramid. Small rugs and tapestries are scattered about the floor here, and they appear to have been used recently.

extra_descs.description: The rugs and tapestries are very fine and worn with age, their colors now faded. They depict scenes of life in an ancient desert city.
The small golden bricks are very smooth and also quite soft.
